scene_description: A view of a kitchen counter featuring a microwave, a large bowl, and several bottles near a stove.

candidates.rationale: One large clear bottle with a label and one smaller bottle with brown liquid are visible on the countertop.
Two rectangular wooden cabinet doors are clearly visible above the microwave and under the ceiling light.

scene_description: A person is sitting at a dark round table containing drinks, a laptop, and a phone, in a dimly lit living area.

candidates.rationale: There are two distinct plastic bottles sitting on the table near the center, one large clear bottle and one smaller bottle with yellow liquid.
Thirteen distinct painted bird figures are visible on the large branch decal applied to the wall on the right side of the image.

scene_description: A kitchen counter area featuring an open microwave, an open oven with items on the door tray, and an open dishwasher.

candidates.rationale: There are two oranges inside the microwave, one green pear, and one small apple on the open oven door tray.
Three colorful plastic lids (two yellow and one purple) are clearly visible in the lower rack of the open dishwasher.

scene_description: A close-up view of a white countertop with several electronic devices and a mug, above a wooden cabinet.

candidates.rationale: There are two horizontal silver metal handles clearly visible on the front of the two wooden cabinet drawers.
One silver laptop and one flat black rectangular device (likely a tablet or thin laptop) are resting on the countertop.

scene_description: A person is using tongs to hold a small wooden peg near a wooden shape sorter toy resting on a dark counter.

candidates.rationale: Four distinct geometric shape cutouts (circle, triangle, rectangle, and trapezoid) are visible on the top surface of the shape sorter toy.
Two round wooden knobs are attached to the front faces of the left and right drawers of the shape sorter toy.

scene_description: A person is holding a Jenga tower on a table in front of a white sofa with pillows.

candidates.rationale: There are 7 distinct layers in the central Jenga tower, with 3 blocks per layer, totaling 21 blocks.
Two large reddish-orange throw pillows are visible resting against the back cushions of the sofa.

scene_description: A collection of colorful toy food cans and one juice box are scattered across a dark circular table.

candidates.rationale: Ten cylindrical toy food cans are clearly visible and distinct on the table surface.
Four cylindrical toy food cans are standing vertically, clearly showing their lids or tops.

scene_description: Three items, including a snack bag, a plastic bottle, and an aluminum can, are placed on a gray cabinet surface.

candidates.rationale: One green and silver aluminum can is standing upright on the lower left side of the table.
One clear plastic bottle is lying horizontally near the center right of the table.

scene_description: A top-down view of a desk showing packaged snacks and an open pull-out tray containing office supplies.

candidates.rationale: Three red packaged snacks labeled 'UNREAL' are clearly visible lying on the light-colored desk surface.
Four distinct packaged snacks, including three red ones and one yellow one, are clearly visible on the desk surface.

scene_description: A person is standing at a kitchen sink and counter, holding a wrapped item, with various cooking utensils and bottles visible.

candidates.rationale: Six bottles (three large blue, three smaller clear/greenish) are standing on the counter behind the sink faucet.
Four distinct white pieces of chopped vegetable are visible lying on the cutting board to the right of the sink.

scene_description: A kitchen scene showing an open dishwasher rack filled with dishes and a counter top holding various food items and kitchen tools.

candidates.rationale: Three distinct colored plastic cups (green, blue, and yellow) are clearly visible hanging on the open dishwasher rack.
Two rectangular cardboard food boxes are visible on the counter: the yellow Corny box and the red Cheez-It box.

scene_description: A robot arm is positioned over a white circular table containing a stuffed animal, a plastic bag, and a small container, with a dark background outside a window.

candidates.rationale: The brown stuffed toy lying on the table has four distinct limbs that can be identified as legs.
Two distinct yellow wooden supports belonging to a chair or stool structure are partially visible behind the robot arm on the left.

scene_description: Various electronic components, cables, and household items are scattered on a desk next to a robot arm and a cardboard box on the floor.

candidates.rationale: There is one orange coiled cable near the top right, and one black coiled cable near the center of the table.
There is a single brown terracotta-colored bowl located on the right side of the table.

scene_description: A variety of packaged grocery items and miscellaneous objects are scattered across a red tablecloth on a table.

candidates.rationale: Three metal cylindrical cans are clearly visible: one open silver can, one stacked ravioli can, and one Campbell's soup can.
There is one solid red cylindrical mug near the top center and one white ceramic mug with a handle in the lower center.

scene_description: A wooden conference table holds various office supplies, electronic devices, and cables, with a person's leg visible below.

candidates.rationale: Five blue pens are lying flat near the center-left, and two blue pens are standing vertically in the black organizer on the right.
One tablet screen is visible on a stand on the right, and one laptop screen is partially visible on the left.

scene_description: A kitchen counter is cluttered with various grocery items and utensils, with one upper cabinet door open revealing shelves of packaged food.

candidates.rationale: One spoon is resting on the counter near the Cheez-It box, and another blue spoon is inside the green bowl in the sink.
One Corny box is on the counter to the left, and a second Corny box is visible on the lower shelf of the open cabinet.

scene_description: A kitchen scene showing built-in appliances, including an open microwave and dishwasher, and overhead cabinets.

candidates.rationale: Two red, spherical objects, likely tomatoes, are clearly visible inside the open microwave oven.
Four distinct circular control knobs are visible on the front panel of the oven located below the microwave.

scene_description: A kitchen counter is shown with various food items, an open refrigerator, and an open drawer containing kitchen utensils.

candidates.rationale: Six distinct kitchen utensils (wooden fork, spoon, spatula, ladle, knife, whisk) are clearly visible lying flat in the open drawer.
There are six rectangular cardboard food packages visible: five on the counter surface and one green carton in the refrigerator door.

scene_description: A collection of miniature grocery items, including cans, bottles, and boxes, are displayed on a black shelf and inside an open drawer.

candidates.rationale: There are 7 standard cylindrical metal food cans visible on the top surface: 4 in the left stack and 3 in the right cluster.
Two identical red and purple Raisins boxes are clearly visible next to each other inside the open drawer.

scene_description: A collection of toy food items, including bottles, boxes, and cans, is piled on a dark surface in front of a window.

candidates.rationale: Three squeezable bottles (ketchup, BBQ sauce, and mustard) are clearly visible on the left side of the arrangement.
Four cylindrical containers are visible: the Alphabet Soup can, the pineapple can, and two smaller decorative cans near the bottom center.
